functionEntry.name: toDictionary
functionEntry.documentation: Convert to dictionary for Loop API call (only carb-entry fields)

functionEntry.name: onServiceCallback
functionEntry.documentation: Handle callbacks from services

functionEntry.name: getAppState
functionEntry.documentation: Get app state for access from other components

functionEntry.name: getNightscoutService
functionEntry.documentation: Get nightscout service for direct access from other components

functionEntry.name: getGlanceView
functionEntry.documentation: Return the glance view for home screen widget

functionEntry.name: cycleChartWindow
functionEntry.documentation: Cycle the trend-chart window: 4h -> 2h -> 1h -> 30m -> 4h

functionEntry.name: updateGlucoseData
functionEntry.documentation: Update glucose data and request UI refresh

functionEntry.name: updateFoodItems
functionEntry.documentation: Update food items list and reset selection

functionEntry.name: isPointInRegion
functionEntry.documentation: True if (x,y) falls inside the given { x0,y0,x1,y1 } region

functionEntry.name: updateHeaderRegion
functionEntry.documentation: Record the header tap region after rendering

functionEntry.name: setSelectedFoodIndex
functionEntry.documentation: Set selected food index

functionEntry.name: updateFoodGridCoordinates
functionEntry.documentation: Update food grid tile coordinates (2-column layout) after rendering

functionEntry.name: updateActiveProfile
functionEntry.documentation: Update active profile only

functionEntry.name: updateChartRegion
functionEntry.documentation: Record the chart tap region after rendering

functionEntry.name: navigateUp
functionEntry.documentation: Navigate to previous food item

functionEntry.name: navigateDown
functionEntry.documentation: Navigate to next food item

functionEntry.name: getSelectedFoodItem
functionEntry.documentation: Get currently selected food item

functionEntry.name: setLoading
functionEntry.documentation: Set loading state

functionEntry.name: updateGlucoseHistory
functionEntry.documentation: Update recent glucose history (list of Lang.Number sgv values, oldest first)

functionEntry.name: updateTempBasals
functionEntry.documentation: Update temp basals and active profile

functionEntry.name: findFoodItemAtPoint
functionEntry.documentation: Find the food item whose grid tile contains the given tap point

functionEntry.name: getCurrentZoneColor
functionEntry.documentation: Get the zone color for the current blood sugar level

functionEntry.name: getTimeSinceUpdate
functionEntry.documentation: Get time since last update as formatted string

functionEntry.name: getDirectionArrow
functionEntry.documentation: Get direction arrow for display

functionEntry.name: getZoneColor
functionEntry.documentation:
Get the zone color for a given glucose value: green in target range,
orange slightly out of range, red far out of range.

functionEntry.name: update
functionEntry.documentation: Update glucose data from Nightscout response

functionEntry.name: getTrendLabel
functionEntry.documentation: Get trend label (STABLE / RISING / FALLING) derived from the CGM direction

functionEntry.name: drawProfileRow
functionEntry.documentation:
Draw one full-width list row, Garmin Edge style: left-aligned label, a
thin separator underneath, and — when active — a green left accent bar,
green label and a checkmark on the right. No boxes, no neon fills.

functionEntry.name: findPresetAtY
functionEntry.documentation: Find preset at given Y coordinate

functionEntry.name: encode
functionEntry.documentation:
Encode given byte array input to SHA1 hash as a byte array
[Toybox::Lang::Array] input The byte array to be encrypted

Returns [Toybox::Lang::Array] computed SHA1 hash as byte array

functionEntry.name: authenticateWithSha1
functionEntry.documentation:
Authenticate given text involving SHA1 and secret key
[Toybox::Lang::Array] key The byte array of secret key

[Toybox::Lang::Array] text The byte array of message to be authenticated

Returns [Toybox::Lang::Array] the authentication code as byte array

functionEntry.name: formatCurrentTimestamp
functionEntry.documentation: Format current timestamp to ISO format (with timezone adjustment)

functionEntry.name: getOtpSecret
functionEntry.documentation: Get OTP secret from properties with fallback

functionEntry.name: generateOtp
functionEntry.documentation: Generate TOTP code using configured secret

functionEntry.name: createFoodEntryData
functionEntry.documentation: Create food entry data structure for Loop API

functionEntry.name: loadAll
functionEntry.documentation: Returns the full list of FoodItem objects from the embedded JSON resource.

functionEntry.name: generateTotpSha1
functionEntry.documentation:
Generate TOTP code, with help of HMAC_SHA1
[Toybox::Lang::String] key The HEX String of secret key

Returns [Toybox::Lang::String] generated TOTP code

functionEntry.name: generateHotpSha1
functionEntry.documentation:
Generate HOTP code, where H (has function) is HMAC_SHA1
[Toybox::Lang::String] keyHex The HEX String of secret key

[Toybox::Lang::String] message The String message to generate OTP

[Toybox::Lang::String] how many digits to generate in OTP (no more then 8)

Returns [Toybox::Lang::String] generated HOTP code

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopDelegate/<>sendFood>
functionEntry.documentation: Send the tapped food to Loop

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopDelegate/<>openProfileSelection>
functionEntry.documentation: Open the profile / temp-override selection view

functionEntry.name: onTap
functionEntry.documentation: Handle a direct tap on a food tile in the grid

functionEntry.name: <globals/TempOverridesInputDelegate/<>getCenterYPosition>
functionEntry.documentation: Get estimated center Y position for button selection

functionEntry.name: requestDataUpdate
functionEntry.documentation: Request data update from the app orchestrator

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopView/<>drawGlucoseChart>
functionEntry.documentation: Draw the last ~4h glucose trend as a bar chart between (x0,y0) and (x1,y1)

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopView/<>drawGlucoseCard>
functionEntry.documentation:
Draw the glucose card: current value, freshness, trend badge and the
last ~4h trend chart. Returns the Y coordinate where the card ends.

functionEntry.name: fetchProfile
functionEntry.documentation: Fetch the active Nightscout profile (staggered, one-shot)

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopView/<>agoLabel>
functionEntry.documentation: "N ago" axis label for a given number of minutes, e.g. "2h ago", "30m ago"

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopView/<>drawFoodGrid>
functionEntry.documentation: Draw the scrollable 2-column grid of food products (icon + name + carbs)

functionEntry.name: <globals/DiabetesFoodLoopView/<>resolveBitmap>
functionEntry.documentation: Resolve the bitmap to display: brand-specific first, then category default.

functionEntry.name: onReceiveFoodEntryResponse
functionEntry.documentation: Handle food entry response

functionEntry.name: <globals/NightscoutService/<>getNightscoutToken>
functionEntry.documentation: Get Nightscout token from properties

functionEntry.name: onReceiveGlucoseData
functionEntry.documentation:
Handle glucose data response: extracts the current value from the most
recent entry AND builds the ~4h trend history from the same response
(a single request, to avoid overloading the BLE request queue).

functionEntry.name: onReceiveAvailableProfiles
functionEntry.documentation: Handle available profiles response (from treatments/overrides)

functionEntry.name: setCallback
functionEntry.documentation: Set callback for receiving data updates

functionEntry.name: onReceivePresetActivationResponse
functionEntry.documentation: Handle preset activation response

functionEntry.name: activatePreset
functionEntry.documentation: Activate a specific override preset

functionEntry.name: <globals/NightscoutService/<>formatCurrentTimestamp>
functionEntry.documentation: Format current timestamp to ISO format for treatments

functionEntry.name: onReceiveActiveProfile
functionEntry.documentation: Handle active profile response (from profile endpoint)

functionEntry.name: fetchGlucoseData
functionEntry.documentation:
Fetch glucose data from Nightscout: a single request returns both the
current value (most recent entry) and the ~4h history used for the
trend chart, avoiding two concurrent BLE requests.

functionEntry.name: sendFoodEntry
functionEntry.documentation: Send food entry to Loop via Nightscout notifications API

functionEntry.name: <globals/NightscoutService/<>getNightscoutUrl>
functionEntry.documentation: Get Nightscout URL from properties

functionEntry.name: <globals/NightscoutService/<>buildUrl>
functionEntry.documentation: Build URL with base Nightscout URL and token

functionEntry.name: fetchTempBasalData
functionEntry.documentation: Fetch temp basal data and active profile
